channel.title: IshuTools.fun — Free PDF Tools by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)
channel.description: 36+ free professional PDF tools by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41 / ISHUKR75). Split PDF, Merge PDF, Compress, Convert, OCR, Translate — all 100% free, no signup, zero quality loss. ishutools.fun

image.title: IshuTools.fun by Ishu Kumar
image.description: IshuTools.fun — Free PDF Tools by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)

item.title: Split PDF Online Free — 8 Modes by Ishu Kumar | IshuTools.fun
item.dc:creator: Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)
item.description:
Split PDF online free with 8 professional modes by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) at ishutools.fun/tools/split-pdf/

  • All Pages — Burst every page into individual PDFs
  • Page Range — Extract specific pages
  • Range Groups — Each range its own PDF (unique feature by Ishu Kumar)
  • Every N Pages — Equal chunk splitting
  • By Bookmarks — One PDF per chapter
  • Blank Separator — Split at blank pages
  • By File Size — Split to target MB
  • Odd/Even — Separate odd and even pages

Zero quality loss. No signup. No watermark. No file size limit. 100% free forever. Created by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41 / ISHUKR75) at ishutools.fun.

media:content.media:title: Split PDF by Ishu Kumar — IshuTools.fun
media:content.media:description: Best free PDF splitter online — 8 modes by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)

item.title: Merge PDF Online Free by Ishu Kumar | IshuTools.fun
item.dc:creator: Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)
item.description: Merge multiple PDF files into one online for free. Drag-and-drop reordering, table of contents generation, page range selection per file. By Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) at ishutools.fun. No signup, no watermark, lossless quality.

item.title: Compress PDF Online Free by Ishu Kumar | IshuTools.fun
item.dc:creator: Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)
item.description: Reduce PDF file size online for free. Professional compression by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) at ishutools.fun. No quality loss, no signup, no size limit.

item.title: OCR PDF — Make Scanned PDF Searchable | Ishu Kumar | IshuTools.fun
item.dc:creator: Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)
item.description: Convert scanned PDF to searchable text using OCR (Tesseract) by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) at ishutools.fun. Free, no signup, supports 100+ languages.

item.title: AI Summarize PDF Free by Ishu Kumar | IshuTools.fun
item.dc:creator: Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)
item.description: AI-powered PDF summarizer by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) at ishutools.fun. Upload any PDF and get an instant intelligent summary. Free, no signup, no API key needed.
